case_title: CHONG FAMILY TRUST FUND 11/7/88 vs. WILBANKS, DON et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHONG FAMILY TRUST FUND 11/7/88 AS TO DEFENDANT WILBANKS, DON CHAPLIN, IVAN DOES 1 TO 10 JASON SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT SERVED FEB-19-1998, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILBANKS, DON
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHONG FAMILY TRUST FUND 11/7/88 SERVED FEB-20-1998, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHAPLIN, IVAN JASON
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT SERVED FEB-20-1998, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHONG FAMILY TRUST FUND 11/7/88 AS TO DEFENDANT WILBANKS, DON CHAPLIN, IVAN JASON

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILBANKS, DON CHAPLIN, IVAN JASON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1020 POST ST #403, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER CRC 522
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WILBANKS, DON CHAPLIN, IVAN JASON
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $14.16 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHONG FAMILY TRUST FUND 11/7/88
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT WILBANKS, DON CHAPLIN, IVAN JASON
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHONG FAMILY TRUST FUND 11/7/88 JUDGMENT OF MAR-11-1998 SET ASIDE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
